div.p: entrySize = 22 + len(topic) + len(payload) + 4 = HeaderSize + TopicLen + PayloadLen + CRC32

ul.li: ROTATING → EMPTY — Rotation always creates new WRITING state
EMPTY → ROTATING — Must write before rotating
file is open for append ROTATING:

div.p: Trigger: First Writer.Append() Guard: currentSize == 0 Action:
Trigger: Post-append size check Guard: currentSize >= MaxSegmentSize (default: 1GB) Action:
Trigger: New file created Guard: os.Rename() successful Action:
